name: self-evolve
description: Point an agent at any skill / repo / project and have it self-iterate inside a git worktree sandbox over multiple rounds, behind an un-gameable acceptance gate so accepted means real improvement rather than a self-deceiving score-up-but-capability-flat curve. Methodology stays constant (reflect, propose, evaluate, judge, accept) while the evaluation signal adapts across three providers: A program adjudication (run tests), B anchor verification (independently checkable facts via URL/SEC/EDGAR/reproducible commands), and C generative evaluation (harness-generated scenarios scored blind by heterogeneous judges, Claude and Codex). Closes six concrete self-deception paths (grader tampering, un-verifiable anchors, holdout overfit, judge collusion, correlated-anchor e-value inflation, covert outbound exfil) with an anytime-valid PACE acceptor, IMMUTABLE decision-code isolation for self-bootstrapping, and crash-replay determinism.
